name: hermes-chat-vscode
description: Chat with Hermes Agent from VS Code or Cursor. MVP extension that sends prompts, selected code and pasted/dropped files to the Hermes CLI.

hermesChat.executable.description: Hermes CLI executable path. Use 'hermes' if it is available on PATH.

hermesChat.extraArgs.description: Extra arguments passed before 'chat -q', for example ['--profile', 'dev'].

hermesChat.includeSelectionByDefault.description: Include the active editor selection in each prompt by default.

hermesChat.maxFileBytes.description: Maximum pasted/dropped attachment size saved by the extension, in bytes.
